items.name_cn:
Authentic Grade
New Arrival🅰️🅰️ When talking about the 24 Fall/Winter show, you can't help but be drawn to the glossy items 👁️ Clean, elegant lines. Minimalist design with intersecting contours. If you can only choose one piece, it must be this TERENCE. The iconic TRIOMPHE logo element, gentle and elegant. Patent calfskin, unique luster and recognizability - A petite and fun shape, can be carried as a handbag or over the shoulder❇️
TRIOMPHE turnlock closure, 1 main compartment
1 interior flat pocket
1 adjustable leather handle
Style No.:118313
Color: Black
Size:21x5.5x11cm

items.name_cn:
Authentic Grade
New Arrival 🅰️🅰️
Celine 23 Early Spring Lisa Style Mini Saddle Bag ~ Besace Arc de Triomphe
The real thing is truly beautiful, retro yet stylish, and goes well with any outfit! The curved bottom and flap design make it look younger. Compared to the mini version, the handle design is playful and cute. A style you'll fall in love with at first glance, exuding elegance when photographed. Can be worn crossbody, shoulder, or carried by hand!
Style: Retro, stylish, and cute~
Capacity: Doesn't fit large phones well, but can hold keys, tissues, compact powder, 💄
Model No.: 10L062 Monogram Brown (Hardware is pure steel)
Dimensions: 15.5-11.5-5 (with original packaging)

items.name_cn:
Authentic Grade
New Arrival🅰️🅰️ CELINE New HELOISE HOBO Shoulder Bag, a must-have for Autumn/Winter! The rounded and smooth body shape looks a bit like the familiar AVA's enlarged version at first glance ~ Celine never disappoints 🫡 This large Hobo gives a very French lazy and casual vibe. Classic color combinations, stylish and chic, not easy to go out of style. The bag capacity can meet short business trips or daily commute, very practical!
Style No.: 114713
Color: Tawny Brown
Size: 30x7.5x28.5

items.name_cn:
Authentic Grade
New Arrival🅰️🅰️ CABAS ANAIS Grain Calfskin Handbag👜 Small. CE's latest tote bag. A different kind of tote.
It looks exceptionally high-end and refined, with a lazy vintage vibe. Simple and understated. It is incredibly practical. Grain calfskin is completely worry-free regarding scratches 🫶🏻 Perfect for forgetful besties~ The side ears can be adjusted freely, and it easily fits a laptop 📒 or daily essentials when open.
Features one main compartment
One interior flat pocket
Two long leather handles
Includes a long shoulder strap
Style: 118613
Color: Light Apricot
Dimensions: 20.5(Opening 35)x9x19cm
💰:

items.name_cn:
Authentic Grade
New Arrival🅰️🅰️ CE New Bucket Bag
Louise is crafted from calfskin suede with a sleek, fluid bucket silhouette. The deep background highlights the exquisite, sparkling gold Triomphe triumph logo, presenting a relaxed and casual temperament. The bag features a handle and a detachable shoulder strap, offering ample capacity for daily commuting, business trips, and office work without any pressure🤎
Style: 116613
Color: Grey (with original packaging)
Dimensions: 28x24x16

items.name_cn:
C Family: Luggage Smile Bag ▶
🔗Classic, timeless, top version, new upgrade
❤️A style that has been popular for many years, still loved this year
❤️Solid exterior, energetic spirit, paired with vintage silver metal, handsome and proud
❤️Perfect silhouette, combining a structure that is wide at the top and narrow at the bottom
❤️Suitable for office workers and creates a casual charm, different styles (with packaging)
Model No.: 189793 Calfskin/Kesec (Color)
Size: 27-25-13
